one_line: Built a read-only failure-mode taxonomy tool that re-scores 57 real REx rollouts (12 probe + 45 HUD, via deterministic rex.scoring replay) into buckets: 36/57 failed = no_fix 22, wrong_root_cause 7, trap_taken 7; 7/7 tests pass; surfaced reward penalizing safe-abstain on unfixable scenarios.
